# kCMMetadataDataType_QuickTimeMetadataLocation_ISO6709

**Global Variable**

A string supplying location information in ISO-6709 format.

## Declaration

```swift
let kCMMetadataDataType_QuickTimeMetadataLocation_ISO6709: CFString
```

## Discussion

Conforms to [doc://com.apple.coremedia/documentation/CoreMedia/kCMMetadataBaseDataType_UTF8].

## Constants

- **kCMMetadataDataType_QuickTimeMetadataDirection**: A string supplying degrees offset from magnetic North.
